ops.body: SHIPPED as 40460452c19c (rebased onto the operator's trustworthy-frame/outcome-resolver stack; full suite 997+ green and Linux docker ty clean post-rebase; the refuter's stale-docstring finding fixed pre-ship in retrain/judged.py). Semantics change, intended: a within-noise AUC delta no longer blocks promotion — the card rule mandates "never a rejection" for sub-threshold deltas, so promotion rides coverage/budget/judged terms; an actionable regression refuses. Known low-severity edge left as-is (refuter finding, non-blocking): zero-DeLong-variance comparisons (identical arms) serialize rho/z as NaN into paired_comparison.json — degenerate measurement, delta=0 verdict unaffected. E28 golden reproduction exact to <=1e-15; new CLI `cc-steer compare-arms`.
